context: Question words are the highest-leverage words in any language - a single one plus a noun gets you an answer. As a visitor you can ask for almost anything with these, even before you can build full sentences. Learn them early and you stop feeling stuck.
explanation: Start with the three you'll point with most: "que" (what), "quien" (who) and "donde" (where). On their own, or in front of a word you know, they already ask a real question.

examples.note: Ask someone to repeat or clarify.
